Source: Dia Release Notes
URL: https://diabrowser.com/release-notes
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Dia Browser Release Notes

## Issue #16 — March 11, 2026 (v1.22.0)
"Don't think about the next step. Take it."
- Proactive Suggestions: AI-curated suggestions based on user activity
- Performance improvements: addressed sluggishness and memory leaks
- Profile switching via keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+1, 2, 3)
- Command Bar: direct routing to Chat and Google Search

## Issue #15 — March 5, 2026 (v1.21.0)
"Before you reach for it..."

## Issue #14 — February 26, 2026 (v1.20.0)
"Little moments. Big feeling."

## Issue #13 — February 19, 2026 (v1.19.0)
"Multiplying tabs? Dia keeps them in check"
- Tab grouping and proactive suggestions

All releases emphasize AI-driven browsing, tab management, and performance optimization.
